hypothesis_or_task.statement: Longitudinal research packets should record collaboration roles before a pattern is promoted into discovery memory.
hypothesis_or_task.intended_use: Research organization and auditability for public-safe discovery infrastructure.

collaboration_roles.responsibility: Identify a candidate pattern or anomaly without claiming causality.
collaboration_roles.failure_if_missing: MC cannot tell whether the hypothesis came from data observation or narrative invention.

collaboration_roles.responsibility: Generate bounded hypotheses and explicitly state competing explanations.
collaboration_roles.failure_if_missing: The system may collapse a pattern into one plausible story.

collaboration_roles.responsibility: Check source availability, temporal boundary, and structured variables.
collaboration_roles.failure_if_missing: Claims may enter memory without a reproducible verification path.

collaboration_roles.responsibility: Decide whether the packet is useful, incomplete, unsafe, or overclaimed.

evidence_boundary.minimum_grounding: At least one external public source plus one structured packet artifact is required.
evidence_boundary.verification_route: Run schema validation and require a curator decision before memory promotion.

review_decision.reason: All required collaboration roles and public-safe evidence boundaries are present.
review_decision.next_executable_action: Wire this gate before evidence-transition promotion.

labels.source_status: public frontier scan plus assistant-generated synthetic fixture
labels.missingness: no production corpus or curator agreement measurements yet
labels.revision_reason: add explicit human-AI role boundaries to prevent responsibility drift
labels.falsification_route: revise if role-boundary packets do not improve reviewer agreement or reduce unsupported memory promotion

hypothesis_or_task.statement: A hypothesis can be promoted after the AI writes a plausible explanation.
